Introduction to Kargo: GitOps Promotion Pipelines for Kubernetes

An introduction to Kargo, the Kubernetes-native tool that brings structured promotion pipelines to GitOps workflows. Learn how Warehouses, Freight, and Stages work together to move your applications safely from dev to production.

kubernetes kargo gitops argo-cd

Getting Started with Argo CD: A Practical Guide to GitOps on Kubernetes

A hands-on introduction to Argo CD, the declarative GitOps continuous delivery tool for Kubernetes. Learn how to install it, deploy your first application, and adopt GitOps best practices.
